Hero.label: Master Your Craft
Hero.title: Elevate Your BA & PM Career Path
Hero.description: Specialized mentoring for Business Analysts and Product Managers. We provide the tactical depth and strategic framework needed to lead high-impact digital transformations.

Footer.tagline: Building the next generation of resilient BA and PM leaders. Precision, strategy, and action in every session.

Curriculum.title: Precision-Built Curriculum
Curriculum.description: We bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and real-world execution through two core pillars.
Curriculum.baDesc: Master requirements engineering, stakeholder management, and technical documentation with radical precision.
Curriculum.pmDesc: Develop strategic empathy, roadmap prioritization, and data-driven decision making for scaling products.

CTA.title: Ready to Elevate Your Career?
CTA.description: Join 500+ professionals who have transformed their career path through our specialized mentoring program.

Programs.title: Practical Training Roadmap
Programs.description: Learn from experts with 10+ years of experience. Not just theory, we teach you how to solve real business problems.
Programs.empty: No training programs are currently displayed.
Programs.corporateDesc: Optimize your IT and Product team performance. We design bespoke roadmaps based on your company's specific challenges.

Blog.title: TankMentor Blog
Blog.description: Strategic insights for Business Analysts and Product Managers navigating the modern tech landscape.
Blog.newsletterTitle: Get tactical insights delivered to your inbox.
Blog.newsletterDesc: Join 2,000+ professionals receiving weekly mentoring on product strategy and execution.

About.quote: "I don't teach you how to use tools, I teach you how to think to become a valuable expert in the eyes of businesses."
About.vision: I believe that every Business Analyst or Project Manager has the potential to become a change leader in their enterprise if they have the right mindset.
About.mission: My mission is to shorten that path for you through hard-earned real-world experiences.
About.transparentDesc: Real sharing, real experience, no fluff.
About.dedicatedDesc: Following each student closely until results are achieved.
About.ctaTitle: Are you ready to upgrade your skills and income?

Contact.title: Let's Build Your Dream Career Together
Contact.description: Have questions about my programs or need custom consulting? Drop a message, I'll reply within 24 hours.
